## Type of change

- [ ] Add project(s)
- [ ] Remove project(s)
- [ ] New category
- [ ] Fix (broken link, description, etc.)
- [ ] Other

## Project(s) added

For each project added, indicate:
- Repository URL
- URL of the EU regulation/institution/standard it supports (e.g., eur-lex.europa.eu, eurostat.ec.europa.eu)
Remove this section if not applicable.
-->

| Project | EU regulation/institution |
|---------|--------------------------|
| https://github.com/... | https://... |

For each project removed, indicate:

Remove this section if not applicable.

| Project | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| https://github.com/... | ... |

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npx awesome-lint` with no errors.
- [ ] There are no **duplicates** in the list.
- [ ] Entries follow the format: `- [Name](URL) ![Stars](...) - Description. ([Demo](...)) \`Language\` \`License\` \`EU-Tag\``
- [ ] Entries include star badge, language, license, and EU regulation tags.
- [ ] Entries are in **alphabetical order** within their section.
